title: The Kroger Co. 2024 Form 10-K
note: Primary annual filing for fiscal 2024 operations, sales, operating profit, risks, and business description.

title: Kroger Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2024 Results
note: Investor-relations release summarizing fiscal 2024 sales and adjusted operating-profit performance.

title: Kroger Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization snapshot used for the registry's market-cap metric and source URL.

title: The Kroger Co. Market Cap and Valuation
note: Supplemental market-data snapshot for valuation and forward P/E context.

title: Kroger Delivery Introduces America's First Customer Fulfillment Center
note: Describes Kroger Delivery, automated fulfillment, and the Ocado technology partnership.

title: Simple Truth
note: Official product page for Kroger's Simple Truth private-label brand family.

title: Kroger 2019 Environmental, Social and Governance Report
note: Company report describing Simple Truth product scope and private-label positioning.

title: Open Food Network
note: Open-source local food marketplace platform used as a credible alternative and enabler for federated grocery commerce.

title: openfoodfoundation/openfoodnetwork
note: Source repository for Open Food Network, supporting openness and implementation-readiness scoring.

title: Open Food Facts
note: Collaborative open food product database used as an alternative transparency layer for private-label grocery products.

title: Open Food Facts GitHub Organization
note: Open-source repositories supporting Open Food Facts software and data infrastructure.
